message:
feat: add Cmd+Shift+. shortcut to close all tabs

- Add closeAllPanels() method - creates new tab then closes all old ones
- Add keyboard shortcut ⌘⇧. (Cmd+Shift+.)
- Add "Close All Tabs" menu item in File menu
- Use capture phase for global shortcuts to work everywhere
- stopPropagation prevents shortcuts from going to terminal

files.patch:
@@ -290,6 +290,7 @@
New Tab⌘/
Close Tab⌘.
+
Close All Tabs⌘⇧.
